summary_en: 130M shares (6.9% of shares outstanding), ¥200B ceiling, May 21–December 23, 2026. Excludes ¥287.4B program announced March 23, 2026. FY2026 total buyback authorization ¥400B.
title_en: Notice Regarding Resolution on Acquisition of Treasury Shares
translation_en_brief: On May 20, 2026, Tokio Marine Holdings' board resolved to acquire up to 130 million treasury shares (6.9% of shares outstanding) for a maximum of ¥200 billion during May 21–December 23, 2026. The company stated that dividends remain the foundation of shareholder returns, with buybacks executed flexibly based on capital levels, market conditions, investment opportunities, and modified EPS growth impact. This authorization is part of the FY2026 annual buyback plan of ¥400 billion and excludes a separate ¥287.4 billion program announced on March 23, 2026. The board retains discretion to adjust execution based on business environment changes.
